Appearances:
Plaintiff Jean Claude Lair is present in pro per.
Defendant James Doyle is present.
Attorney Trenton Montgomery representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Deborah Schweitzer, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled per Judge Pro Tem Schweitzer.

The trial date of FEB-06-2012 is vacated.
